query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A monochromatic image showing an elongated, bright form stretching diagonally from the upper left toward the lower right across a solid black background. The light-colored shape widens toward the bottom right, displaying layered, translucent volumes in pale gray and white tones. The composition is minimal, with the luminous figure occupying the central diagonal axis against an otherwise unbroken black field.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract black-and-white photograph rendered with intentional motion blur and extreme underexposure that crushes nearly the entire frame into solid black. A diagonal, flowing streak of pale light stretches from the upper left toward the lower right, its edges softened into billowing, translucent layers concentrated near the bottom right. The subject is unrecognizable, abandoning representational clarity in favor of gestural shape and ethereal tonal contrast.
